chapter_title.en: The Amount of Water for Ablution and Ghusl

text: 73 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنَّ اَلرَّجُلَ لَيَعْبُدُ اَللَّهَ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً وَ مَا يُطِيعُهُ فِي اَلْوُضُوءِ لِأَنَّهُ يَغْسِلُ مَا أَمَرَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِمَسْحِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.73 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"A man may worship Allah (swt) for forty years but does not truly obey Him in wudu (ablution) because he washes what Allah (swt), Mighty and Majestic, commanded him to wipe."
